chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4229 of 2025 (Muhammad Asad versus Federation of Pakistan & another) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 19.1.2026 Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan advocate for the petitioner Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG Mr. Abdul Samad, Law Officer of NADRA --------------------- Petitioner Muhammad Asad has filed this Constitutional Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 seeking directions to the NADRA for issuance of CNIC. In compliance whereof, the objections have been filed on behalf of respondent No.2 with the narration that appropriate directions be issued to the petitioner to approach the Regional Verification Board (V&R Branch) at Awami Markaz, Shahrah-e-Faisal alongwith all relevant and necessary documents for re-analyzation and passing a speaking order. This proposition was put forward to the counsel for the petitioner, who seeks disposal of the instant petition in terms of the statement made by the Law Officer of NADRA, RHO NADRA, Karachi and requests that this exercise may be completed within one week. The request seems to be reasonable and acceded to. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
